FURINA_CARD_STRIKE_FURINA.title: Strike
FURINA_CARD_DEFEND_FURINA.title: Defend
FURINA_CARD_INVITE_GUEST.title: Invite Guest
FURINA_CARD_ANNOUNCER.title: Announcer
FURINA_CARD_ANNOUNCER.description: {ArkheState:choose(Ousia|Pneuma|None):The next [purple]Attack[/purple] card you play costs 1 less Energy.|The next [color=#FFFF00]Skill[/color] card you play costs 1 less Energy.|The next [purple]Attack[/purple][color=#FFFF00]Skill[/color] card you play costs 1 less Energy.}
FURINA_CARD_IMPROMPTU.title: Impromptu
FURINA_CARD_RONDO.title: Rondo
FURINA_CARD_RONDO.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the leftmost and rightmost enemies.
FURINA_CARD_ARIA_STRIKE.title: Aria Strike
FURINA_CARD_ARIA_STRIKE.description: {ArkheState:choose(Ousia|Pneuma|None):Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [purple]Vulnerable[/purple].|Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [color=#FFFF00]Weak[/color].|Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [purple]Vulnerable[/purple] and {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [color=#FFFF00]Weak[/color].}
FURINA_CARD_SCRIPT.title: Script
FURINA_CARD_SCRIPT.description: Play all cards from the [gold]Script[/gold] pile.
FURINA_CARD_SUDDEN_CALAMITY.title: Sudden Calamity
FURINA_CARD_SUDDEN_CALAMITY.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Draw {Draw:diff()} card.
FURINA_CARD_AUDITION.title: Audition
FURINA_CARD_AUDITION.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw {Draw:diff()} card. It costs 1 less Energy this turn.
FURINA_CARD_SUPPORTING_STRIKE.title: Supporting Strike
FURINA_CARD_SUPPORTING_STRIKE.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Summon a random Salon member.
FURINA_CARD_REVERSAL.title: Reversal
FURINA_CARD_SCENE_STEALER.title: Scene Stealer
FURINA_CARD_SCENE_STEALER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If you haven't played any other cards this turn, hit 1 additional time.
FURINA_CARD_GRAND_FINALE.title: Grand Finale
FURINA_CARD_EMBRACE.title: Embrace
FURINA_CARD_REST.title: Rest
FURINA_CARD_WARMUP.title: Warmup
FURINA_CARD_RUSH.title: Rush
FURINA_CARD_RUSH.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s). If you have at least 8 cards in hand, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
FURINA_CARD_READ_THROUGH.title: Read Through
FURINA_CARD_READ_THROUGH.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain 1 additional Block for each other card in your hand.
FURINA_CARD_DAILY.title: Daily
FURINA_CARD_DAILY.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If the last card you played was a Skill, gain {BonusBlock:diff()} additional Block.
FURINA_CARD_REHEARSAL.title: Rehearsal
FURINA_CARD_REHEARSAL.description:
Choose 1 card in hand. It costs 1 less Energy for the rest of combat.
[gray]Exhaust.[/gray]
FURINA_CARD_TRANSITION.title: Transition
FURINA_CARD_BLOCKING.title: Blocking
FURINA_CARD_SLOW_MOTION.title: Slow Motion
FURINA_CARD_ENCORE.title: Encore
FURINA_CARD_ENCORE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you've played at least 5 other cards this turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) and gain {Energy:diff()} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
FURINA_CARD_LAST_STAND.title: Last Stand
FURINA_CARD_LAST_STAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
You cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold] from cards this turn.
FURINA_CARD_MODULATION.title: Modulation
FURINA_CARD_MODULATION.description: {ArkheState:choose(Ousia|Pneuma|None):Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies [purple]and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable[/purple].|Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies [color=#FFFF00]2 times[/color].|Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies [color=#FFFF00]2 times[/color] [purple]and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable[/purple].}
FURINA_CARD_ADAPT.title: Adapt
FURINA_CARD_ADAPT.description: {ArkheState:choose(Ousia|Pneuma|None):[purple]Give[/purple] a [purple]player[/purple] {AdaptStrengthPower:diff()} [purple]Strength[/purple] this turn.|Make an [color=#FFFF00]enemy[/color] [color=#FFFF00]lose[/color] {AdaptStrengthPower:diff()} [color=#FFFF00]Strength[/color] this turn.|Make a [purple]player[/purple] [color=#FFFF00]enemy[/color] [purple]gain[/purple] [color=#FFFF00]lose[/color] {AdaptStrengthPower:diff()} Strength this turn.}
FURINA_CARD_CHORUS.title: Chorus
FURINA_CARD_CHORUS.description: The next {ChorusPower:diff()} OusiaPneuma card(s) you play have both effects.
FURINA_CARD_REUNION.title: Reunion
FURINA_CARD_REUNION.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
If your hand is full, gain {BonusBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
FURINA_CARD_MASQUERADE.title: Masquerade of the Guilty
FURINA_CARD_MASQUERADE.description:
Draw 2 cards.
At the start of your next {MasqueradePower:diff()} turns, draw 2 cards.
If you draw fewer than 10 cards in a turn, die.
All cards in your hand cost 1 less Energy this turn. Exhaust.
FURINA_CARD_GODFALL.title: Godfall
FURINA_CARD_CARNIVAL_FORM.title: Carnival Form
FURINA_CARD_CARNIVAL_FORM.description: Whenever you draw a card on your turn, gain {CarnivalFormStrengthPower:diff()} [purple]Strength[/purple] and {CarnivalFormDexterityPower:diff()} [color=#FFFF00]Dexterity[/color] this turn.
FURINA_CARD_SUFFERING_HOLY_SON.title: Suffering Holy Son
FURINA_CARD_SUFFERING_HOLY_SON.descripti: Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP. This act's Boss loses {MaxHpLoss:diff()} Max HP.
FURINA_CARD_BEST_LEADING_ACTOR.title: Best Leading Actor
FURINA_CARD_BEST_LEADING_ACTOR.descripti: The first {BestLeadingActorPower:diff()} [gold]Arkhe[/gold] card(s) you play each turn have both effects.
FURINA_CARD_DAUGHTER_OF_WATER_THIRD_MOVE: {SequenceProgress}Choose any number of cards in hand to Exhaust. Exhaust.
FURINA_CARD_APPRENTICESHIP.title: Apprenticeship
FURINA_CARD_APPRENTICESHIP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Hit 1 additional time for each consecutive Attack card you played before this one.{IsTargeting: (current: {ConsecutiveAttacks:diff()})|}
FURINA_CARD_SALON_TEA_PARTY.title: Salon Tea Party
FURINA_CARD_EVERYONE_OUT.title: Everyone Out!
FURINA_CARD_EVERYONE_OUT.description:
[gold]Invite[/gold] all Salon members.
Your Salon members can take {EveryoneOutPower:diff()} additional action(s).
FURINA_CARD_ALL_EYES_ON_ME.title: All Eyes on Me
FURINA_CARD_ALL_EYES_ON_ME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have at least 9 other cards in hand, double the damage and gain {Energy:diff()} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
FURINA_CARD_ALL_THE_WORLDS_A_STAGE.title: All the World's a Stage
FURINA_CARD_ALL_THE_WORLDS_A_STAGE.descr: Randomly write {IfUpgraded:show:4|3} cards from other characters into the [gold]Script[/gold]. Exhaust.
FURINA_CARD_WATER_AND_JUSTICE.title: Water and Justice
FURINA_CARD_WATER_AND_JUSTICE.descriptio:
Choose a card in hand. It costs 2 less Energy for the rest of the run.
Remove this card from your deck at the end of combat.
FURINA_CARD_ENTRUST.title: Entrust
FURINA_CARD_MISE_EN_SCENE.title: Mise en Scène
FURINA_CARD_MISE_EN_SCENE.description: {ArkheState:choose(Ousia|Pneuma|None):Choose 2 cards from your [purple]Draw Pile[/purple] to add to your hand. Exhaust.|Choose 2 cards from your [color=#FFFF00]Discard Pile[/color] to add to your hand. Exhaust.|Choose 2 cards from your Draw Pile to add to your hand. Exhaust.}
FURINA_CARD_BACKUP_DANCER.title: Backup Dancer
FURINA_CARD_BACKUP_DANCER.description:
Can be upgraded infinitely.
 Gain {Block} [gold]Block[/gold], {Repeat:diff()} times.When you upgrade another card, this card also upgrades.
